calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Modifying Irrevocable Trust
Off Calendar Dec-30-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kevin Urbatsch appeared by zoom for Petitioner.

The court stated that it had the chance to review all of the papers submitted in connection with this petition and although there are some wrinkles in it, it seems it is something that should be granted. Mr. Urbatsch had nothing to add. The court stated that based on what it read and the consents to the petition from all of the parties, the contingent beneficiaries and their positions on it, it's something that can and should be granted. The Petition for Order Modifying Irrevocable Trust is under submission with the court's intent to grant the petition.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition For Order Modifying Irrevocable Trust
Off Calendar Dec-01-2021 Continued To Dec-29-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
